email_body:
Beste heer/mevrouw Dimov,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor SEO Manager bij George Dimov, CPA. Uw focus op organische zichtbaarheid en leadgeneratie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in SEO, contentoptimalisatie en technische audits.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com implementeerde ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entiteitoptimalisatie en GEO-technieken om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik werk dagelijks met tools zoals Google Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs.

Hoewel ik nog geen ervaring heb in de accountancy, ben ik een snelle leerling en gemotiveerd om uw online aanwezigheid te versterken. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen om te verbeteren).

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek meer te vertellen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Mr./Ms. Dimov,

I am writing with great enthusiasm to apply for the SEO Manager position at George Dimov, CPA. Your focus on organic visibility and lead generation aligns perfectly with my experience in SEO, content optimization, and technical audits.

At Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blogs, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I work daily with tools like Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs.

Although I do not yet have experience in accounting, I am a quick learner and motivated to strengthen your online presence. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons to improve).

I have attached my CV and cover letter. I hope to tell you more in an interview.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw Dimov,

Uw vacature voor SEO Manager bij George Dimov, CPA trok direct mijn aandacht. Uw nadruk op organische zichtbaarheid, leadgeneratie en datagedreven optimalisatie sluit perfect aan bij mijn vaardigheden en ervaring.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, keyword research en het schrijven van SEO-vriendelijke blogcontent. Ik bouw en onderhoud WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra, en ik monitor prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Google Search Console. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd hoe technische optimalisatie en contentstrategie samenwerken om rankings en conversies te verbeteren.

Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entiteitoptimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) toegepast. Dit project heeft mij inzicht gegeven in hoe AI-zoekmachines content verwerken en hoe ik zichtbaarheid kan vergroten via zowel traditionele als nieuwe kanalen. Ik ben bekend met linkbuilding en off-page SEO, hoewel ik hier nog meer ervaring in wil opdoen.

Hoewel ik geen specifieke ervaring heb in accountancy of financiële dienstverlening, ben ik analytisch, leergierig en gewend om zelfstandig te werken in een remote omgeving. Uw bedrijf heeft een sterke reputatie met 5-sterren reviews; ik zie kansen om uw online aanwezigheid verder te versterken door gerichte SEO-strategieën.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik ben gevestigd in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en fulltime beschikbaar.

Ik voeg mijn CV bij en hoop u in een gesprek te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Mr./Ms. Dimov,

Your vacancy for SEO Manager at George Dimov, CPA immediately caught my attention. Your emphasis on organic visibility, lead generation, and data-driven optimization aligns perfectly with my skills and experience.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword research, and writing SEO-friendly blog content. I build and maintain WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra, and I monitor performance using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console. This experience has taught me how technical optimization and content strategy work together to improve rankings and conversions.

Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). This project has given me insight into how AI search engines process content and how to increase visibility through both traditional and new channels. I am familiar with link building and off-page SEO, though I want to gain more experience in this area.

Although I have no specific experience in accounting or financial services, I am analytical, eager to learn, and accustomed to working independently in a remote environment. Your firm has a strong reputation with 5-star reviews; I see opportunities to further strengthen your online presence through targeted SEO strategies.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available full-time.

I have attached my CV and hope to convince you in an interview.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• On-page SEO, keyword research, and technical SEO audits for client websites at Episto
• Implemented structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO for AI search visibility on mirook.com
• Proficient with SEO tools: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs
• Built and maintained WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra, including content optimization
• Analytical, independent worker with experience in remote collaboration and performance reporting
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO audits, keyword research, on-page optimization, and content strategy. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage full-cycle WordPress site builds. On my own project (mirook.com), I applied structured data, entity optimization, and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Skilled in using Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Analytics to track performance and guide decisions. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
